# Building Material Dealer Insurance

> Specialized commercial insurance for building material dealers, lumber yards, building supply yards, and hardware distributors — by Contractors Choice Agency. Property & inventory, general liability, workers' comp, commercial auto & delivery, inland marine, product liability, equipment breakdown, and umbrella coverage, packaged as one program.

Building Material Dealer Insurance (buildingmaterialdealerinsurance.com) is the building-material-dealer specialization of Contractors Choice Agency, an independent insurance agency founded in 2005 by Josh Cotner, a former contractor. The agency is licensed in all 50 states (NPN 8608479) and writes coverage for lumber yards, building supply dealers, drywall/roofing/insulation/millwork supply yards, hardware distributors, home-improvement supply stores, and sawmills nationwide. Quote turnaround is approximately 15 minutes; claims response is guaranteed within 2 hours, 24/7.

The site covers the eight coverage lines that make up a complete building-material-dealer program, with a dedicated page for each, plus a blog addressing the niche's specific exposures (lumber-yard fire, product liability for distributors, inland marine for delivery operations, equipment breakdown, and more). The intended buyer is the owner, general manager, or risk manager of a lumber yard, building supply operation, or hardware distribution business.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://buildingmaterialdealerinsurance.com/): Overview of the complete building material dealer insurance program
- [Coverage Lines](https://buildingmaterialdealerinsurance.com/services): All eight coverage lines with descriptions
- [General Liability](https://buildingmaterialdealerinsurance.com/services/general-liability): Premises & operations liability for dealer yards
- [Property & Inventory](https://buildingmaterialdealerinsurance.com/services/property-inventory): Building, stock, and lumber-stack fire coverage
- [Workers' Compensation](https://buildingmaterialdealerinsurance.com/services/workers-compensation): Work comp for forklift, loading & yard crews
- [Commercial Auto & Delivery](https://buildingmaterialdealerinsurance.com/services/commercial-auto-delivery): Box trucks, flatbeds & delivery fleet
- [Inland Marine & Cargo](https://buildingmaterialdealerinsurance.com/services/inland-marine): Goods in transit & on the yard
- [Product Liability](https://buildingmaterialdealerinsurance.com/services/product-liability): Coverage for goods you sell but don't make
- [Equipment Breakdown](https://buildingmaterialdealerinsurance.com/services/equipment-breakdown): Kilns, compressors, dust collection & boilers
- [Umbrella & Excess Liability](https://buildingmaterialdealerinsurance.com/services/umbrella-excess): Catastrophe limits over primary policies
- [Coverage Area](https://buildingmaterialdealerinsurance.com/coverage): Licensed in all 50 states
- [About](https://buildingmaterialdealerinsurance.com/about): Contractors Choice Agency background
- [Get a Quote](https://buildingmaterialdealerinsurance.com/quote): Free 15-minute quote form
- [Contact](https://buildingmaterialdealerinsurance.com/contact): Phone, email, and message form
- [Blog](https://buildingmaterialdealerinsurance.com/blog): Field-tested insurance guidance for the building supply trade
